scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter backend dev" "pnpm --filter frontend dev"
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter backend exec prisma migrate deploy && pnpm --filter backend exec prisma generate
scripts.db:migrate:dev: pnpm --filter backend exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter backend exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter frontend exec tsc --noEmit
